parameters.query:
SELECT p.id AS user_id, p.display_name, p.streak_current,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('title', e.title, 'category', e.category, 'date', e.event_date))
   FROM (SELECT * FROM ship_events se WHERE se.user_id = p.id AND se.event_date >= current_date - 7 ORDER BY se.event_time DESC LIMIT 12) e) AS recent
FROM profiles p;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 160, system: $json.system, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.user }] }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO nudges (user_id, body, created_at) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, now());
